## Summary

## EP-227 Public Release Safety

- [ ] This PR does not add secrets, personal data, customer data, production
      logs, or proprietary third-party code.
- [ ] Licence boundaries are preserved: Apache SDK files remain separate from
      restricted Developer Edition/devkit/runtime files.
- [ ] Any new dependency has an allowed licence or an approved exception.
- [ ] Any public claim is backed by evidence and approved wording.

External contributions are not accepted until KSwitch enables an approved
DCO/CLA/no-external-contributions workflow.
